name: wireshark
verify: powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -NoProfile -NonInteractive -Command "$exe = 'C:\Program Files\Wireshark\Wireshark.exe'; $log = Join-Path (Join-Path $env:SystemDrive 'MAST') 'logs\verify\wireshark-verify.log'; if (Test-Path $exe) { Set-Content -Path $log -Value 'Wireshark installed'; Set-Content -Path (Join-Path (Join-Path $env:SystemDrive 'MAST') 'logs\smoke\wireshark-smoke.txt') -Value 'wireshark_ok' } else { 'Wireshark.exe not found' | Out-File $log }"
